description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the image registry.gitlab.com/rilis/docker-ci:ci-latest with two stages docs and deploy. In the docs stage add a doxygen job that runs the commands: hell --install -r '=' -G 'Ninja' -i "CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=14", mkdir build, cd build, cmake ../ -G 'Ninja' -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=../.hell/install -DCMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=14, ninja install, cd .., rm -rf rili, mv .hell/install/include/rili rili, doxygen Doxyfile; it stores the generated doxygen/html directory as an artifact that expires in 1 day. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that runs: rm -rf ~/rilis.io.doxygen/, cp -r doxygen/html ~/rilis.io.doxygen/, chmod -R o=rx ~/rilis.io.doxygen/; it publishes the same doxygen/html as an artifact that expires in 100 years, sets the environment name "rilis.io doxygen" with URL https://rilis.io/doxygen, runs only on tag pipelines, and uses runner tags deploy and rilis.io.
